specific_mechanism: Cuttlefish match background pattern via central nervous control of millions of chromatophores; match achieved in <1s with no learning, suggesting rapid scene-decomposition algorithm
llm_application: LLM rapid context-adaptation: scene-decomposition algorithm extracted from cuttlefish camouflage applied to LLM persona-shifting; sub-second adaptation to user-style without per-user fine-tuning.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes marine-biology phase-coherence mapping as proposed.
